Additionally, we propose a matrix compression technique leveraging a dual heuristic greedy algorithm (DHGA), forming the foundation of our architecture-specific mapping strategy. Experimental results demonstrate that, within given area constraints, our architecture achieves an average energy efficiency improvement of 29.8% and a speedup of 82.3% across various networks compared to the baseline.
items.abstract_zh: 近年来，内存计算 (CIM) 已成为一个突出的研究热点，为推进传统冯·诺依曼架构计算机提供了一种有前景的替代方案。然而，CIM 固有的广泛阵列结构和外围电路带来了与延迟和功耗相关的挑战。操作单元（OU）作为这些问题的实用解决方案而受到关注，显着改变了内存计算的计算范式。尽管具有潜力，但这种方法所带来的可能性仍未得到充分探索。本文提出了一种新颖的单通道架构，围绕 OU 实现进行设计，并采用针对稀疏网络优化的新 OU 分区方法。此外，我们提出了一种利用双启发式贪婪算法（DHGA）的矩阵压缩技术，形成了我们特定于架构的映射策略的基础。实验结果表明，在给定的区域限制内，与基线相比，我们的架构在各种网络上的平均能效提高了 29.8%，加速了 82.3%。

items.title: RV-SCNN: A RISC-V Processor With Customized Instruction Set for SNN and CNN Inference Acceleration on Edge Platforms.
items.abstract: The rapid advancement of artificial intelligence (AI) applications has driven an increasing demand for conducting inference tasks on edge devices. However, implementing computation-intensive neural networks on resource-constrained edge systems remains a significant challenge. In this article, we propose a novel processor architecture called RV-SCNN to address this challenge. The architecture is based on the RISC-V generic instruction set and incorporates various single instruction multiple data (SIMD) custom instruction extensions to accelerate the computation of spike neural networks (SNNs) and convolutional neural networks (CNNs), enabling efficient execution of complex neural network models. The core operators of the processor are shared by both SNN and CNN operations, thus supporting both computation modes. Other acceleration implementations include an internal hardware loop control unit that reduces the instruction overhead, an address calculation unit and an interlayer fusion unit that minimize the memory access overhead, as well as an image to column (IM2COL) unit that improves the computational efficiency of the 3 × 3 convolutions in SNNs and CNNs. The custom instructions are called through inline assembly in the C program, providing higher flexibility compared to traditional ASICs and supporting custom complex SNN/CNN network structures. Compared to traditional instruction sets, the RV-SCNN processor reduces the execution time of CNNs and SNNs by over 90%. We validate the processor on FPGA platform and evaluate its performance under CMOS 55-nm process. The processor achieves an operational efficiency of 9.88 pJ/SOP in SNN network inference tasks, while the peak energy efficiency reaches 679 GOPS/W in CNN network inference.
items.abstract_zh: 人工智能 (AI) 应用的快速发展推动了在边缘设备上执行推理任务的需求不断增长。然而，在资源受限的边缘系统上实现计算密集型神经网络仍然是一个重大挑战。在本文中，我们提出了一种称为 RV-SCNN 的新型处理器架构来应对这一挑战。该架构基于RISC-V通用指令集，并融合了各种单指令多数据（SIMD）自定义指令扩展，以加速尖峰神经网络（SNN）和卷积神经网络（CNN）的计算，从而能够高效执行复杂的神经网络模型。该处理器的核心算子由 SNN 和 CNN 运算共享，因此支持两种计算模式。其他加速实现包括减少指令开销的内部硬件循环控制单元、最大限度减少内存访问开销的地址计算单元和层间融合单元，以及提高 3 × 3 卷积。自定义指令通过C程序中的内联汇编进行调用，与传统ASIC相比提供了更高的灵活性，并支持自定义复杂的SNN/CNN网络结构。与传统指令集相比，RV-SCNN处理器将CNN和SNN的执行时间减少了90%以上。我们在 FPGA 平台上验证该处理器，并评估其在 CMOS 55 nm 工艺下的性能。该处理器在SNN网络推理任务中实现了9.88 pJ/SOP的运行效率，而在CNN网络推理任务中峰值能效达到679 GOPS/W。

items.title: PreSIT: Predict Cryptography Computations in SGX-Style Integrity Trees.
items.abstract: In recent years, SGX-style integrity trees (SITs) have been applied in trusted execution environments (TEEs) to protect the off-chip memory security from physical attacks, replay attacks, etc. As a tradeoff, SIT implementations incur a huge performance overhead due to its extra computations and memory accesses. Recent works reduced the memory accesses and significantly increased the speed, but the performance overhead is still high. To tackle this challenge, this article performs an insight analysis under current SIT implementations, then identifies two critical remaining performance overhead causes: 1) hash and 2) decryption computations. Next, a novel design named PreSIT based on a proposed parallel operation flow is introduced. It performs prefetching and precomputes partial results of hash and decryption processes. By designing the prediction algorithm flow and predict-assisted algorithms, along with the proposed dedicated prediction data structure to effectively store and access the precomputed results, the performance overhead is further reduced. According to the evaluations of GEM5 on SPEC 2017, GAP, PARSEC, and SPLASH2x, PreSIT improves the average instruction per cycle (IPC) by 5.1% (at most 21.6%) based on the SIT in VAULT without any security degradation.
items.abstract_zh: 近年来，SGX 风格的完整性树 (SIT) 已被应用于可信执行环境 (TEE)，以保护片外内存安全免受物理攻击、重放攻击等。作为权衡，SIT 实现由于其额外的计算和内存访问而产生巨大的性能开销。最近的工作减少了内存访问并显着提高了速度，但性能开销仍然很高。为了应对这一挑战，本文在当前 SIT 实现下进行了深入分析，然后确定了两个关键的剩余性能开销原因：1) 哈希和 2) 解密计算。接下来，介绍了一种基于并行操作流程的名为 PreSIT 的新颖设计。它执行预取并预计算哈希和解密过程的部分结果。通过设计预测算法流程和预测辅助算法，以及所提出的专用预测数据结构来有效存储和访问预计算结果，进一步降低了性能开销。根据GEM5对SPEC 2017、GAP、PARSEC和SPLASH2x的评估，PreSIT在VAULT中的SIT的基础上，平均每周期指令（IPC）提高了5.1%（最多21.6%），且安全性没有下降。

items.title: Vision Transformer Acceleration via a Versatile Attention Optimization Framework.
items.abstract: Vision Transformers (ViTs) have achieved remarkable success across various tasks. However, their deployment is hindered by challenges, such as high memory requirements, long inference latency, and significant power consumption. To address these challenges, existing works optimize one of the two key stages on ViT’s critical path: linear projection or self-attention. Regrettably, we have noticed that both linear projection and self-attention can potentially become bottlenecks as the input image resolution varies, which makes the existing approaches lack generality. Accordingly, in this article, we propose a versatile attention optimization framework. On the algorithm side, we present a SpQuant algorithm that sparsifies weight matrices offline and input matrices online during linear projection as well as tunes the bit-width of the probabilities matrix according to their importance. On the hardware side, we design SQArch architectures to improve the performance of the SpQuant algorithm. The proposed SQArch architecture offers a low-cost preprocess module that predicts and prunes nonkey elements of the input matrix on the fly. Moreover, we design a compute module that supports sparse-sparse matrix multiplications (SpMSpM) and multiple precision computations on a single systolic array for generality. Furthermore, we can address the underutilization and workload imbalance problems by 1) decoupling the rows in the systolic array for enough flexibility and 2) proposing a workload balance scheme for SpMSpM that allows the array to accept data of similar sparsity, thereby reducing synchronization between computing units. Extensive experiment results demonstrate that SQArch can achieve satisfactory performance speedups and energy saving compared to state-of-the-art designs.
items.abstract_zh: Vision Transformers (ViTs) 在各种任务中取得了显着的成功。然而，它们的部署受到内存要求高、推理延迟长和功耗大等挑战的阻碍。为了应对这些挑战，现有的工作优化了 ViT 关键路径上的两个关键阶段之一：线性投影或自注意力。遗憾的是，我们注意到，随着输入图像分辨率的变化，线性投影和自注意力都可能成为瓶颈，这使得现有方法缺乏通用性。因此，在本文中，我们提出了一种通用的注意力优化框架。在算法方面，我们提出了一种 SpQuant 算法，该算法可以在线性投影期间离线稀疏权重矩阵并在线输入矩阵，并根据概率矩阵的重要性调整概率矩阵的位宽。在硬件方面，我们设计了SQArch架构来提高SpQuant算法的性能。所提出的 SQArch 架构提供了一个低成本的预处理模块，可以动态预测和修剪输入矩阵的非关键元素。此外，我们设计了一个计算模块，支持稀疏-稀疏矩阵乘法（SpMSpM）和单个脉动阵列上的多精度计算，以实现通用性。此外，我们可以通过以下方式解决利用率不足和工作负载不平衡问题：1）将脉动阵列中的行解耦以获得足够的灵活性；2）为 SpMSpM 提出工作负载平衡方案，允许阵列接受类似稀疏性的数据，从而减少计算单元之间的同步。大量的实验结果表明，与最先进的设计相比，SQArch 可以实现令人满意的性能加速和节能。

items.title: Fast Acceleration Strategies for XOR-Based Erasure Codes.
items.abstract: Erasure coding is a common redundancy scheme for tolerating failures in storage systems. Compared with replication, erasure coding saves a large amount of storage space, but incurs heavy computation overhead and, is more time consuming. In this article, we accelerate the coding speed with three techniques. First, we propose an algorithm to search coding bitmatrices with fewer 1’s from Vandermonde and Cauchy matrices, and further optimize the coding bitmatrices by greedily reducing the number of 1’s in the bitmatrices. So we can find near-optimal coding bitmatrices with the number of 1’s only up to 1% more than the lower bound. Next, we redesign the process of building pointers and reuse the pointers to access data for coding, which obtains a better tradeoff between spatial locality and computation efficiency. Finally, we smartly decompose the coding procedure of wide stripes into multiple subprocedures, to improve spatial locality and reduce the number of XORs. Based on the proposed techniques, we implement an erasure coding library, Cerasure. Extensive experiments show that Cerasure significantly improves the coding throughput. Compared with the state-of-the-art erasure coding libraries, Zerasure and SLPEC, Cerasure increases the encoding throughput by up to 200.2%.
items.abstract_zh: 纠删码是存储系统中用于容忍故障的常见冗余方案。与复制相比，纠删码节省了大量的存储空间，但计算开销较大，并且更耗时。在本文中，我们通过三种技术来加快编码速度。首先，我们提出了一种算法，从范德蒙德矩阵和柯西矩阵中搜索具有较少1的编码位矩阵，并通过贪婪地减少位矩阵中1的数量来进一步优化编码位矩阵。因此，我们可以找到接近最优的编码位矩阵，其 1 的数量仅比下限多 1%。接下来，我们重新设计了构建指针的过程，并重用指针来访问数据进行编码，从而在空间局部性和计算效率之间获得更好的权衡。最后，我们巧妙地将宽条带的编码过程分解为多个子过程，以提高空间局部性并减少异或的数量。基于所提出的技术，我们实现了一个纠删码库 Cerasure。大量实验表明，Cerasure 显着提高了编码吞吐量。与最先进的纠删码库Zerasure和SLPEC相比，Cerasure将编码吞吐量提高了200.2%。

items.title: PRO-TIME: Prerouting Optimization-Aware Timing Prediction via Multimodal Learning.
items.abstract: Fast and accurate prerouting timing prediction is crucial in the very-large-scale integration (VLSI) design flow. Existing machine learning (ML)-assisted prerouting timing evaluators neglect the impact of timing optimization, which may render their approaches impractical in real circuit design flows. To address the challenges posed by timing optimization, we propose PRO-TIME, a prerouting optimization-aware timing prediction framework that is driven by multimodal learning. Specifically, we propose a novel endpoint embedding framework that integrates both netlist and layout information. A customized graph neural network (GNN) model is used for extracting endpoint-wise netlist information, which is motivated by the delay propagation process. Meanwhile, we apply the U-net model with a masking strategy to extract endpoint-wise layout information. Furthermore, we propose an adaptive layout mask adjustment scheme to boost performance by leveraging the layout information more effectively. Comprehensive experiments on large-scale RISC-V designs with advanced 7-nm technology node demonstrate the superiority of our model compared to the state-of-the-art prerouting timing evaluators.
items.abstract_zh: 快速、准确的预布线时序预测在超大规模集成 (VLSI) 设计流程中至关重要。现有的机器学习 (ML) 辅助预布线时序评估器忽略了时序优化的影响，这可能导致其方法在实际电路设计流程中不切实际。为了解决时序优化带来的挑战，我们提出了 PRO-TIME，这是一种由多模态学习驱动的预路由优化感知时序预测框架。具体来说，我们提出了一种新颖的端点嵌入框架，它集成了网表和布局信息。定制的图神经网络（GNN）模型用于提取端点方式的网表信息，这是由延迟传播过程驱动的。同时，我们应用带有掩蔽策略的 U-net 模型来提取端点布局信息。此外，我们提出了一种自适应布局掩模调整方案，以通过更有效地利用布局信息来提高性能。采用先进 7 nm 技术节点的大规模 RISC-V 设计的综合实验证明了我们的模型相对于最先进的预路由时序评估器的优越性。

items.title: HISIM: Analytical Performance Modeling and Design Space Exploration of 2.5D/3D Integration for AI Computing.
items.abstract: Monolithic designs face significant fabrication cost and data movement challenges, especially when executing complex and diverse AI models. Advanced 2.5D/3D packaging promises high bandwidth and connection density to overcome these challenges, yet it also introduces new electro-thermal constraints. This article develops a suite of analytical performance models to enable efficient benchmarking of a 2.5D/3D heterogeneous system for energy-efficient AI computing. These models encompass various performance metrics related to computing units, network-on-chip (NoC), and network-on-package (NoP). The results are summarized into a new tool, HISIM, which is 10^4 × – 10^6 × faster than state-of-the-art AI benchmark tools. Furthermore, HISIM integrates rapid thermal simulation for the 2.5D/3D system, helping shed light on both the potential and limitations of 2.5D/3D heterogeneous integration (HI) on representative AI algorithms. The code of HISIM is available at https://github.com/mec-UMN/HISIM .
items.abstract_zh: 单片设计面临着巨大的制造成本和数据移动挑战，特别是在执行复杂且多样化的人工智能模型时。先进的 2.5D/3D 封装有望提供高带宽和连接密度来克服这些挑战，但它也引入了新的电热约束。本文开发了一套分析性能模型，可对 2.5D/3D 异构系统进行高效基准测试，以实现节能 AI 计算。这些模型包含与计算单元、片上网络 (NoC) 和封装网络 (NoP) 相关的各种性能指标。结果被汇总到一个新工具 HISIM 中，即 10^4 × – 10^6 × 比最先进的 AI 基准测试工具更快。此外，HISIM 集成了 2.5D/3D 系统的快速热仿真，有助于揭示代表性 AI 算法上 2.5D/3D 异构集成 (HI) 的潜力和局限性。 HISIM 的代码可在 https://github.com/mec-UMN/HISIM 获取。

items.title: Improving Transformer Inference Through Optimized Nonlinear Operations With Quantization-Approximation-Based Strategy.
items.abstract: Transformers have recently shown significant performance across various tasks, such as natural language processing (NLP) and computer vision (CV). However, the performance comes at the cost of large memory and computation overhead. Existing researches primarily focus on accelerating matrix multiplication (MatMul) through techniques like quantization and pruning, notably increasing the proportion of nonlinear operations in inference runtime. Meanwhile, previous approaches designed for nonlinear operations struggle with inefficient implementation as they are incapable of achieving both computation and memory efficiency. Additionally, these methods often require retraining or fine-tuning leading to substantial costs and inconveniences. To overcome these problems, we propose efficient implementation of nonlinear operations with quantization-approximation-based strategy. Through an in-depth analysis of the dataflow and data distribution of nonlinear operations, we design distinct quantization and approximation strategies tailored for different operations. Specifically, log2 quantization and power-of-two factor quantization have been employed in Softmax and LayerNorm, complemented by logarithmic function and low-precision statistic calculation as approximation strategies. Furthermore, the proposed efficient GeLU implementation integrates a nonuniform lookup procedure alongside low-bit-width quantization. Experimental results demonstrate negligible accuracy drops without the need for retraining or fine-tuning. By implementing the hardware design, it achieves 3.14× - 6.34× energy-efficiency and 3.01× - 10.1× area-efficiency improvements compared to state-of-the-art application-specific-integrated-circuit (ASIC) designs. In system-level evaluation, substantial speedup and reductions in energy consumption of 15% to 35% are achieved for end-to-end inference across both GPU and ASIC accelerator platforms.
items.abstract_zh: Transformer 最近在自然语言处理 (NLP) 和计算机视觉 (CV) 等各种任务中表现出了显着的性能。然而，性能的提高是以大量内存和计算开销为代价的。现有的研究主要集中在通过量化和剪枝等技术加速矩阵乘法（MatMul），特别是增加推理运行时非线性运算的比例。与此同时，以前为非线性运算设计的方法由于无法同时实现计算和内存效率，因此实施效率低下。此外，这些方法通常需要重新训练或微调，从而导致巨大的成本和不便。为了克服这些问题，我们提出使用基于量化近似的策略来有效实现非线性运算。通过对非线性运算的数据流和数据分布的深入分析，我们针对不同的运算设计了不同的量化和逼近策略。具体来说，Softmax和LayerNorm中采用了log2量化和二幂量化，并辅以对数函数和低精度统计计算作为逼近策略。此外，所提出的高效 GeLU 实现集成了非均匀查找过程和低位宽量化。实验结果表明，无需重新训练或微调，准确性下降可以忽略不计。通过实现硬件设计，它实现了 3.14× - 6.34× 能源效率和 3.01× - 10.1× 与最先进的技术相比，面积效率提高专用集成电路 (ASIC) 设计。在系统级评估中，GPU 和 ASIC 加速器平台的端到端推理均实现了 15% 至 35% 的大幅加速和能耗降低。

items.title: COSA Plus: Enhanced Co-Operative Systolic Arrays for Attention Mechanism in Transformers.
items.abstract: The attention mechanism is becoming a vital building block across various modern neural networks, e.g., Transformers. However, it encounters low efficiency when deployed on the general-purpose GPU/CPU platform, which motivates the dedicated accelerator design. Existing accelerators are commonly devised by exploring the potential sparsity in attention mechanism using a hardware-software codesign scheme, which suffers from complicated training, fine-tuning processes, and possible accuracy degradation. More importantly, the sparse pattern only focuses on certain datasets with less generality, and the fine-grained sparse pattern could also bring hardware inefficiency. Instead, we try to solve these issues from another perspective: by systematically analysing the inherent dataflow characteristics of the attention mechanism, we propose the co-operative systolic arrays (COSAs) with an optimized dataflow to support the general purpose attention mechanism and pursue higher computational efficiency. COSA system exploits the high parallelism from the inherent model and leverages run-time configurable hybrid dataflows, i.e., weight and output stationary (OS) for a systolic array (SA) to support the varying matrix multiplication in the attention mechanism. Regarding the cascaded matrix multiplications, COSA proposes levels of fusion methodologies to reduce the off-chip access and enhance processing element (PE) utilization, such as directly using the result of OS as the weight of weight stationary SA by deep fusion. Additionally, the COSA system also provides the solution to hide the latency and radically save the buffer size related to the softmax. Experiment results show that, across various benchmarks, COSA can achieve 2.29-2.60× throughput improvement over the traditional SA of the same MAC number, with up to 94.7% PE utilization rate and 8.2× less off-chip memory access. Compared with the general-purpose platforms, 7.6-12.4× energy efficiency over NVIDIA GeForce 3090 GPU and 35.2-80.9× energy efficiency over Intel 6226R server CPU.
items.abstract_zh: 注意力机制正在成为各种现代神经网络（例如变形金刚）的重要组成部分。然而，它在通用GPU/CPU平台上部署时遇到效率低下的问题，这促使了专用加速器的设计。现有的加速器通常是通过使用硬件-软件协同设计方案探索注意力机制中潜在的稀疏性来设计的，该方案面临复杂的训练、微调过程和可能的准确性下降。更重要的是，稀疏模式只关注某些数据集，通用性较差，而且细粒度的稀疏模式也会带来硬件效率低下的问题。相反，我们尝试从另一个角度解决这些问题：通过系统分析注意力机制固有的数据流特征，我们提出了具有优化数据流的协作脉动阵列（COSA），以支持通用注意力机制并追求更高的计算效率。 COSA 系统利用固有模型的高并行性，并利用运行时可配置的混合数据流，即脉动阵列 (SA) 的权重和输出固定 (OS)，以支持注意力机制中的变化矩阵乘法。对于级联矩阵乘法，COSA提出了层次融合方法来减少片外访问并提高处理元件（PE）利用率，例如通过深度融合直接使用OS的结果作为权重平稳SA的权重。此外，COSA系统还提供了隐藏延迟并从根本上节省与softmax相关的缓冲区大小的解决方案。实验结果表明，在各种基准测试中，与传统方法相比，COSA 可以实现 2.29-2.60× 吞吐量提升相同 MAC 号的 SA，PE 利用率高达 94.7%，片外内存少 8.2× 访问。与通用平台相比， 7.6-12.4× 能源效率超过 NVIDIA GeForce 3090 GPU与 Intel 6226R 服务器 CPU 相比， 35.2-80.9× 能效。

items.title: Efficient Modeling Attack on Multiplexer PUFs via Kronecker Matrix Multiplication.
items.abstract: The physical unclonable function (PUF) is valued for its lightweight nature and unique functionality, making it a common choice for securing hardware products requiring authentication and key generation mechanisms. In response to the susceptibility of individual PUFs to modeling attacks, advanced PUF variants have been developed to improve security measures. One notable type in this regard is the multiplexer-based composition of arbiter PUFs, known as MPUF, which aims to meet high reliability and security standards simultaneously. Current research on attacking MPUF encounters challenges, such as substantial demands for training CRPs and low success rates. In this work, we propose a novel numerical modeling attack strategy for MPUFs. Using Kronecker products from mathematical perspective, this method precisely describes the MPUF model without using complex network architectures, boosting attack accuracy, and overall efficiency. Experiment comparison with state-of-the-art works demonstrates that our method achieves better performance in terms of attack accuracy, robustness, and efficiency. Our method is able to successfully attack a (512, 8)-MPUF in 32.71 min with 97.14% accuracy, outperforming all existing attack methods on MPUFs. More, we validate our method through experiments with hardware implementations on FPGAs. The advantages of our method also include the adaptability to be employed to attack other MPUF variations like cMPUF and rMPUF, and the capability to be integrated with an existing attack method for launching efficient attack on MPUFs leveraging reliability information.
items.abstract_zh: 物理不可克隆功能 (PUF) 因其轻量级性质和独特功能而受到重视，使其成为保护需要身份验证和密钥生成机制的硬件产品的常见选择。为了应对单个 PUF 对建模攻击的敏感性，开发了高级 PUF 变体来改进安全措施。在这方面，一种值得注意的类型是基于多路复用器的仲裁器 PUF 组合，称为 MPUF，其旨在同时满足高可靠性和安全标准。目前攻击MPUF的研究面临着训练CRP需求量大、成功率低等挑战。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新颖的 MPUF 数值建模攻击策略。该方法利用数学角度的克罗内克积，精确描述了MPUF模型，无需使用复杂的网络架构，提高了攻击精度和整体效率。与最先进作品的实验比较表明，我们的方法在攻击准确性、鲁棒性和效率方面取得了更好的性能。我们的方法能够在 32.71 分钟内成功攻击 (512, 8)-MPUF，准确率达到 97.14%，优于所有现有的 MPUF 攻击方法。此外，我们通过 FPGA 上的硬件实现实验验证了我们的方法。我们的方法的优点还包括用于攻击其他 MPUF 变体（如 cMPUF 和 rMPUF）的适应性，以及与现有攻击方法集成的能力，以便利用可靠性信息对 MPUF 发起有效攻击。

items.title: On Optimizing Inter- and Intra-Chiplet Interconnection Topologies for Robust Multi-Chiplet Systems.
items.abstract: Inter- and intra-chiplet interconnection networks play a vital role in the operation of many core systems made of multiple chiplets. However, these networks are susceptible to faults caused by manufacturing defects and attacks resulting from the malicious insertion of hardware Trojans and backdoors. Unlike conventional fault-tolerant or countermeasure methods, this article focuses on optimizing network robustness to withstand both faults and attacks, while considering the constraints of chiplet area and power budget. To achieve this, this article first defines network robustness as a quantifiable measure based on various network parameters, after which an optimization problem is formulated to optimize the robustness of the network topology. To efficiently solve this problem, a reinforcement learning algorithm is proposed. Experimental results demonstrate that the proposed method is capable of generating inter- and intra-chiplet interconnection networks that are significantly more robust than existing topology generation methods. Specifically, the proposed method improves robustness over ButterDonut and Kite, respectively, by an average of 10.88% and 14.06% under random faults and by 9.37% and 7.81% under targeted attacks. These experimental results confirm that the proposed method is capable of generating robust inter- and intra-chiplet interconnection networks that can withstand both faults and attacks. By optimizing the network topology’s robustness, it provides a valuable contribution to the design and security of chiplet-based core systems.
items.abstract_zh: 小芯片间和小芯片内互连网络在由多个小芯片组成的许多核心系统的运行中发挥着至关重要的作用。然而，这些网络容易受到制造缺陷造成的故障以及恶意插入硬件木马和后门造成的攻击。与传统的容错或对策方法不同，本文重点关注优化网络鲁棒性以抵御故障和攻击，同时考虑小芯片面积和功率预算的限制。为了实现这一目标，本文首先将网络鲁棒性定义为基于各种网络参数的可量化度量，然后制定优化问题来优化网络拓扑的鲁棒性。为了有效地解决这个问题，提出了一种强化学习算法。实验结果表明，所提出的方法能够生成小芯片间和小芯片内互连网络，该网络比现有拓扑生成方法更加鲁棒。具体来说，该方法比 ButterDonut 和 Kite 的鲁棒性分别提高了 10.88% 和 14.06%，在随机故障下平均提高了 10.88% 和 14.06%，在针对性攻击下平均提高了 9.37% 和 7.81%。这些实验结果证实，所提出的方法能够生成鲁棒的小芯片间和小芯片内互连网络，能够抵御故障和攻击。通过优化网络拓扑的稳健性，它为基于小芯片的核心系统的设计和安全性做出了宝贵的贡献。

items.title: An Improved Two-Step Attack on Lattice-Based Cryptography: A Case Study of Kyber.
items.abstract: After three rounds of post-quantum cryptography (PQC) strict evaluations conducted by NIST, CRYSTALS-Kyber was successfully selected in July 2022 and standardized in August 2024. It becomes urgent to further evaluate Kyber’s physical security for the upcoming deployment phase. In this brief, we present an improved two-step attack on Kyber to quickly recover the full secret key, s, by using much fewer power traces and less time. In the first step, we use the correlation power analysis (CPA) to obtain a portion of guess values of s with a small number of power traces. The CPA is enhanced by utilizing both Pearson and Kendall’s rank correlation coefficients and modifying the leakage model to improve the accuracy. In the second step, we adopt the lattice attack to recover s based on the results of CPA. The success rate is largely built up by constructing a trial-and-error method. We deploy the reference implementations of Kyber-512, -768, and -1024 on an ARM Cortex-M4 target board and successfully recover s in approximately 9\sim 10 min with at most 15 power traces, using a Xeon Gold 6342-equipped machine for the attack.
items.abstract_zh: 经过 NIST 进行的三轮后量子密码学（PQC）严格评估，CRYSTALS-Kyber 于 2022 年 7 月成功入选，并于 2024 年 8 月标准化。在即将到来的部署阶段，进一步评估 Kyber 的物理安全性变得刻不容缓。在这篇简报中，我们提出了一种对 Kyber 的改进的两步攻击，通过使用更少的功率痕迹和更少的时间来快速恢复完整的密钥 s。第一步，我们使用相关功效分析（CPA）来通过少量功效迹线获得 s 的部分猜测值。通过利用 Pearson 和 Kendall 的等级相关系数并修改泄漏模型来提高准确性，CPA 得到了增强。第二步，我们根据CPA的结果采用格子攻击来恢复s。成功率很大程度上是通过构建试错方法来建立的。我们在 ARM Cortex-M4 目标板上部署了 Kyber-512、-768 和 -1024 的参考实现，并成功恢复了大约 9\sim 10 美元 分钟，最多 15 条电源轨迹，使用配备 Xeon Gold 6342 的机器进行攻击。

items.title: Carbon Nanotube Interconnect Optimizations With Bayesian Neural Network and Bayesian Optimization.
items.abstract: As Cu interconnects near their physical limits with continued technology scaling, carbon nanotube (CNT) interconnects have emerged as a promising alternative due to their excellent conductivity. However, fabrication immaturity introduces significant process variations, causing discrepancies between ideal and actual performance. This article presents a novel approach to optimize CNT interconnects considering process variations. We first develop a parameterized CNT interconnect model that accounts for process variations. Using this model, a Bayesian neural network (BNN) is proposed to predict performance distributions by leveraging its inherent uncertainty. We then introduce a Bayesian optimization framework that uses the BNN’s posterior to jointly optimize interconnect parameters and buffer insertion, targeting area-delay product (ADP) with process variations. Experimental results demonstrate the effectiveness of our approach. The proposed BNN model achieves over 95% prediction accuracy for interconnects performance distributions. Compared to existing methods, our method achieves an average ADP improvement of 20.3% over the state-of-the-art methods and 13% over the standard Monte Carlo method. Compared with Monte Carlo method, our method also achieves an average 8.8× acceleration. Moreover, the optimized CNT interconnects show an average improvement of 82.8% in ADP and 68.7% in delay compared to Cu interconnects. This work offers an effective method for optimizing CNT interconnects under process variations and highlights their potential as a viable alternative to Cu interconnects in future integrated circuits.
items.abstract_zh: 随着技术不断扩展，铜互连线已接近其物理极限，碳纳米管 (CNT) 互连线因其优异的导电性而成为一种有前途的替代品。然而，制造不成熟会带来显着的工艺变化，导致理想性能与实际性能之间的差异。本文提出了一种考虑工艺变化来优化 CNT 互连的新颖方法。我们首先开发一个参数化的 CNT 互连模型来解释工艺变化。使用该模型，提出了贝叶斯神经网络（BNN），利用其固有的不确定性来预测性能分布。然后，我们引入了一个贝叶斯优化框架，该框架使用 BNN 的后验来联合优化互连参数和缓冲区插入，针对具有工艺变​​化的面积延迟积 (ADP)。实验结果证明了我们方法的有效性。所提出的 BNN 模型对互连性能分布的预测精度达到了 95% 以上。与现有方法相比，我们的方法比最先进的方法平均 ADP 提高了 20.3%，比标准蒙特卡罗方法提高了 13%。与蒙特卡洛方法相比，我们的方法还实现了平均 8.8× 加速度。此外，与 Cu 互连相比，优化的 CNT 互连的 ADP 平均提高了 82.8%，延迟平均提高了 68.7%。这项工作提供了一种在工艺变化下优化 CNT 互连的有效方法，并强调了它们作为未来集成电路中 Cu 互连的可行替代品的潜力。

items.title: AccALS 2.0: Accelerating Approximate Logic Synthesis by Simultaneous Selection of Multiple Local Approximate Changes.
items.abstract: Approximate computing emerges as an energy-efficient computing paradigm designed for applications that can tolerate errors. Many iterative methods for approximate logic synthesis (ALS) have been developed to automatically synthesize approximate circuits. Nonetheless, most of them overlook the potential of applying multiple local approximate changes (LACs) simultaneously in one iteration, which can significantly reduce the overall computation time. In this article, we propose AccALS 2.0, a novel framework for further accelerating iterative ALS flows, which is based on simultaneous selection of multiple LACs in a single round. However, there are two challenges for selecting multiple LACs. The first is that the mutual influence of multiple LACs can affect the estimation of the circuit error. The second is that there may exist conflicts among multiple LACs. To address these issues, first, we propose an efficient measure for the mutual influence between two LACs. With its help, we transform the problems of solving the LAC conflicts and selecting multiple LACs into a unified maximum independent set problem for solving. The experimental results showed that AccALS 2.0 outperforms state-of-the-art ALS methods in runtime, while achieving similar or better-circuit quality.
items.abstract_zh: 近似计算作为一种节能计算范式而出现，专为能够容忍错误的应用程序而设计。已经开发了许多近似逻辑综合（ALS）的迭代方法来自动综合近似电路。尽管如此，他们中的大多数人都忽视了在一次迭代中同时应用多个局部近似变化（LAC）的潜力，这可以显着减少总体计算时间。在本文中，我们提出了 AccALS 2.0，这是一种进一步加速迭代 ALS 流程的新颖框架，它基于在单轮中同时选择多个 LAC。然而，选择多个 LAC 存在两个挑战。首先是多个LAC的相互影响会影响电路误差的估计。二是多个LAC之间可能存在冲突。为了解决这些问题，首先，我们提出了衡量两个 LAC 之间相互影响的有效措施。借助它，我们将解决LAC冲突和选择多个LAC的问题转化为统一的最大独立集问题来求解。实验结果表明，AccALS 2.0 在运行时优于最先进的 ALS 方法，同时实现相似或更好的电路质量。

items.title: Multiobjective Coverage Optimization for 3-D Heterogeneous Wireless Sensor Networks.
items.abstract: Aiming at the problems of low coverage, poor connectivity, and high energy consumption in 3-D heterogeneous wireless sensor networks (3-D HWSNs), this article constructs a multiobjective coverage optimization model that balances coverage, connectivity, and energy consumption. Meanwhile, this article proposes a multiobjective spider wasp optimizer (MOSWO) based on a spider wasp optimizer (SWO) to solve the problem. First, incorporating an external archive allows MOSWO to obtain and store Pareto optimal solutions. Second, an important-objective trend operator and improving SWO’s mating behavior enhance the algorithm’s optimization ability. Finally, A spherical divergence operator is introduced to reduce the redundancy of sensor nodes. To compare the coverage optimization performance of the proposed algorithm, MOSWO MOAAO, MOEA/D, MOPSO, MOAHA, and NSGA-II are used to solve the MCO problem of 3-D HWSNs in obstacle and no-obstacle scenes. The experimental results show that the Pareto front of MOSWO is optimal compared to the Pareto fronts of MOAAO, MOEA/D, MOPSO, MOAHA, and NSGA-II. MOSWO performs effectively in improving coverage and network connectivity, reducing energy consumption.
items.abstract_zh: 针对3-D异构无线传感器网络（3-D HWSN）覆盖率低、连接性差、能耗高等问题，构建了平衡覆盖、连接性和能耗的多目标覆盖优化模型。同时，本文在蜘蛛黄蜂优化器（SWO）的基础上提出了多目标蜘蛛黄蜂优化器（MOSWO）来解决该问题。首先，合并外部存档允许 MOSWO 获取并存储 Pareto 最优解。其次，重要目标趋势算子和改进SWO的交配行为增强了算法的优化能力。最后，引入球形散度算子来减少传感器节点的冗余。为了比较所提出算法的覆盖优化性能，使用 MOSWO MOAAO、MOEA/D、MOPSO、MOAHA 和 NSGA-II 来解决障碍和无障碍场景中 3-D HWSN 的 MCO 问题。实验结果表明，与MOAAO、MOEA/D、MOPSO、MOAHA和NSGA-II的Pareto前沿相比，MOSWO的Pareto前沿是最优的。 MOSWO 在改善覆盖范围和网络连接、降低能耗方面表现出色。

items.title: ParSGCN: Bridging the Gap Between Emulation Partitioning and Scheduling.
items.abstract: Efficient functional verification is crucial in the very-large-scale integration (VLSI) design flow. Existing processor-based emulation systems suffer from low efficiency due to the gap between partitioning and scheduling during compilation. To address the above concern, we propose ParSGCN, a scheduling-friendly emulation compilation flow that considers the objective of scheduling during partitioning. To incorporate the hard-to-perceive look-ahead information about scheduling, we embed it into a net cut probability distribution, which is easier to utilize. We estimate this probability distribution using a tailored variant of graph convolutional network (GCN) that is trained through a customized loss function and a large dataset of real-world compilation solutions. Additionally, we have developed a set of novel techniques to guide the emulation partitioning process using the estimated probability distribution. The proposed method is integrated into an industrial emulator and evaluated on large-scale designs with up to over 100 million cells. Comprehensive experimental results demonstrate the effectiveness of ParSGCN, showcasing an average improvement of 16.38%, 26.04%, and 19.52% in the best, worst, and median solution quality, respectively, based on 50 runs.
items.abstract_zh: 高效的功能验证在超大规模集成 (VLSI) 设计流程中至关重要。由于编译期间分区和调度之间的差距，现有的基于处理器的仿真系统效率低下。为了解决上述问题，我们提出了 ParSGCN，一种调度友好的仿真编译流程，考虑了分区期间调度的目标。为了整合有关调度的难以感知的前瞻信息，我们将其嵌入到更易于使用的净割概率分布中。我们使用图卷积网络（GCN）的定制变体来估计这种概率分布，该变体通过定制的损失函数和真实世界编译解决方案的大型数据集进行训练。此外，我们还开发了一套新技术来使用估计的概率分布来指导模拟分区过程。所提出的方法被集成到工业仿真器中，并在多达 1 亿多个单元的大规模设计上进行评估。综合实验结果证明了 ParSGCN 的有效性，基于 50 次运行，最佳、最差和中值解质量分别平均提高了 16.38%、26.04% 和 19.52%。

items.title: Fast-OverlaPIM: A Fast Overlap-Driven Mapping Framework for Processing In-Memory Neural Network Acceleration.
items.abstract: Processing in-memory (PIM) is promising to accelerate neural networks (NNs) because it minimizes data movement and provides large computational parallelism. Similar to machine learning accelerators, application mapping, which determines the operation scheduling and data layout, plays a critical role in the NN acceleration on PIM. The mapping optimization of the previous NN accelerators focused on optimizing the latency of sequential execution. However, PIM accelerators feature a distinct design space of application mapping from conventional NN accelerators, due to the spatial execution of NN layers across different memory locations. This enables opportunities for overlapping execution of consecutive NN layers to improve the latency, where the succeeding layer can start execution before the preceding layer fully completes the computation. In this article, we propose Fast-OverlaPIM framework that incorporates computational overlapping optimization into the deep neural network mapping exploration process on PIM architectures. Fast-OverlaPIM includes analytical algorithms for fast and accurate overlap analysis. Furthermore, it proposes a novel mapping search strategy and a transformation mechanism to enable efficient design space exploration on the overlap-based mapping for the whole network. Our framework demonstrates a significant improvement in runtime performance from 3.4× to 323.1× compared to the previous state-of-the-art overlap-based framework. Our experiments show that Fast-OverlaPIM can efficiently produce mappings that are 4.6× to 18.1× faster than the state-of-the-art mapping optimization framework under the same architecture constraints.
items.abstract_zh: 内存处理 (PIM) 有望加速神经网络 (NN)，因为它最大限度地减少数据移动并提供大量计算并行性。与机器学习加速器类似，应用映射决定了操作调度和数据布局，在 PIM 上的神经网络加速中起着至关重要的作用。之前的神经网络加速器的映射优化主要集中在优化顺序执行的延迟上。然而，由于 NN 层跨不同内存位置的空间执行，PIM 加速器具有与传统 NN 加速器不同的应用程序映射设计空间。这使得连续 NN 层有机会重叠执行以改善延迟，其中后续层可以在前一层完全完成计算之前开始执行。在本文中，我们提出了 Fast-OverlaPIM 框架，它将计算重叠优化合并到 PIM 架构上的深度神经网络映射探索过程中。 Fast-OverlaPIM 包括用于快速、准确重叠分析的分析算法。此外，它提出了一种新颖的映射搜索策略和转换机制，以实现整个网络基于重叠的映射的有效设计空间探索。我们的框架展示了运行时性能的显着改进，从 3.4× 到 323.1× 与之前最先进的基于重叠的框架相比。我们的实验表明，Fast-OverlaPIM 可以有效地生成 4.6× 到 18.1× 在相同架构约束下比最先进的映射优化框架更快。

items.title: DiffPattern-Flex: Efficient Layout Pattern Generation via Discrete Diffusion.
items.abstract: Recent advancements in layout pattern generation have been dominated by deep generative models. However, relying solely on neural networks for legality guarantees raises concerns in many practical applications. In this article, we present \textsf DiffPattern -Flex, a novel approach designed to generate reliable layout patterns efficiently. \textsf DiffPattern -Flex incorporates a new method for generating diverse topologies using a discrete diffusion model while maintaining a lossless and compute-efficient layout representation. To ensure legal pattern generation, we employ an optimization-based, glass-box pattern assessment process based on specific design rules. Furthermore, fast sampling and efficient legalization technologies are employed to accelerate the generation process. Experimental results across various benchmarks demonstrate that \textsf DiffPattern -Flex significantly outperforms existing methods and excels at producing reliable layout patterns.
items.abstract_zh: 布局模式生成的最新进展主要由深度生成模型主导。然而，仅仅依靠神经网络来保证合法性在许多实际应用中引起了担忧。在本文中，我们介绍了 \textsf DiffPattern -Flex，这是一种旨在高效生成可靠布局模式的新颖方法。 \textsf DiffPattern -Flex 采用了一种新方法，使用离散扩散模型生成不同的拓扑，同时保持无损且计算高效的布局表示。为了确保合法的模式生成，我们采用基于特定设计规则的基于优化的玻璃盒模式评估流程。此外，采用快速采样和高效的合法化技术来加速生成过程。各种基准测试的实验结果表明， \textsf DiffPattern -Flex 显着优于现有方法，并且擅长生成可靠的布局图案。

items.title: Finite Element Approach Based Numerical Framework for Device Simulator.
items.abstract: In this work, a finite element method (FEM)-based numerical framework is proposed to effectively calculate the drift-diffusion equations and compiled into a parallel computing device simulator. In this framework, a novel upwind FEM is developed to solve the convection dominated continuity equations. In the implementation of the upwind method, the vector basis functions are employed to interpolate the edge streamline upwind (SU) current densities into mesh grid to obtain the spatial current density, and then the scalar FEM is used to construct the element matrix equation. Through comparing the calculating results of a 2-D PN-junction with those obtained by the COMSOL Semiconductor, the accuracy of proposed framework is verified first. Then, through several numerical cases, its advantages in comparison with FBSG-, SU Petrov Galerkin (SUPG)-, or control-volume-finite-element method SUPG-based frameworks in terms of mesh grid adaptivity, computing stability, and efficiency are presented. At last, by combining the proposed framework with a domain decomposition scheme and a fully coupled Newton’s approach, a parallel computing device simulator is developed, including both steady-state and transient solvers. The performance of the in-house simulator is evaluated in terms of calculating accuracy, large-scale problem solution capability, and scalabilities.
items.abstract_zh: 在这项工作中，提出了一种基于有限元法（FEM）的数值框架来有效计算漂移扩散方程，并将其编译成并行计算设备模拟器。在此框架中，开发了一种新颖的迎风有限元法来求解对流主导的连续性方程。在逆风法的实现中，利用矢量基函数将边缘流线逆风（SU）电流密度插值到网格中以获得空间电流密度，然后使用标量有限元构造单元矩阵方程。通过将二维 PN 结的计算结果与 COMSOL Semiconductor 获得的计算结果进行比较，首先验证了所提出框架的准确性。然后，通过几个数值案例，展示了其与基于FBSG、SU Petrov Galerkin (SUPG)或基于控制体积有限元法SUPG的框架在网格自适应性、计算稳定性和效率方面的优势。最后，通过将所提出的框架与域分解方案和完全耦合的牛顿方法相结合，开发了并行计算设备模拟器，包括稳态和瞬态求解器。内部模拟器的性能从计算精度、大规模问题解决能力和可扩展性等方面进行评估。

items.title: Intermittent OTA Code Update Framework for Tiny Energy Harvesting Devices.
items.abstract: The widespread deployment of various tiny energy harvesting devices has facilitated the expansion of Internet of Things (IoT) applications, notably in remote and hard-to-reach areas. Once deployed, a critical limitation of these devices is their inability to adapt code to evolving environmental conditions or user requirements. This challenge primarily arises from frequent power interruptions during code updates in energy harvesting devices, unlike their battery-powered counterparts, which can lead to significant errors or system failures. In response, we have designed an innovative framework for facilitating intermittent over-the-air (OTA) code updates in tiny energy harvesting devices. Our approach incorporates Intermittent-aware Update Operations, including insert, modify, delete, and copy, tailored for a variety of update scenarios while accommodating intermittent power and resource constraints. Furthermore, We have designed a Fault-tolerant bootloader that enables the intermittent update capability. This advanced bootloader enables code updates without system reboots and ensures correct task resumption of both routine and update tasks. This not only conserves energy by reducing the need for repetitive reboots but also ensures consistent code updates despite frequent power failures. Additionally, our framework integrates an update-aware checkpointing mechanism to provide reliable backups for both routine tasks and update tasks. This proposed framework presents a general solution for enabling intermittent code updates in tiny energy harvesting devices. Our experimental results demonstrate that the proposed approach outperforms existing approaches under conditions of insufficient harvested energy.
items.abstract_zh: 各种微型能量收集设备的广泛部署促进了物联网（IoT）应用的扩展，特别是在偏远和难以到达的地区。一旦部署，这些设备的一个关键限制是它们无法使代码适应不断变化的环境条件或用户需求。这一挑战主要源于能量收集设备代码更新期间的频繁电源中断，与电池供电的设备不同，这可能会导致严重错误或系统故障。为此，我们设计了一个创新框架，用于促进微型能量收集设备中的间歇性无线 (OTA) 代码更新。我们的方法结合了间歇性感知更新操作，包括插入、修改、删除和复制，专为各种更新场景而定制，同时适应间歇性电力和资源限制。此外，我们还设计了一个容错引导加载程序，可以实现间歇性更新功能。这种先进的引导加载程序无需重新启动系统即可进行代码更新，并确保例行任务和更新任务的正确任务恢复。这不仅通过减少重复重新启动的需要来节省能源，而且还可以确保在频繁断电的情况下保持一致的代码更新。此外，我们的框架集成了更新感知检查点机制，为常规任务和更新任务提供可靠的备份。该框架提出了一种通用解决方案，用于在微型能量收集设备中实现间歇性代码更新。我们的实验结果表明，在收集能量不足的情况下，所提出的方法优于现有方法。

items.title: FPGA Technology Mapping With Adaptive Gate Decomposition.
items.abstract: FPGA technology mapping is an extensively studied problem. There is functional decomposition as well as graph covering-based approaches. For efficiency consideration, most existing algorithms are graph covering-based. However, logic synthesis can affect the graph covering results significantly. In this article, we propose an FPGA mapping algorithm with gate decomposition. Bin-packing is used to generate gate decompositions during mapping to avoid the decomposition choice pregeneration problem in existing approaches. Our results show that our algorithm can get an average of 13% area reduction over the state-of-the-art lossless synthesis-based mapping algorithm in ABC. When compared with industrial tool Vivado, we can get a significant area reduction of 35% on average.
items.abstract_zh: FPGA 技术映射是一个广泛研究的问题。有功能分解以及基于图覆盖的方法。出于效率考虑，现有算法大多数都是基于图覆盖的。然而，逻辑综合会显着影响图覆盖结果。在本文中，我们提出了一种具有门分解的 FPGA 映射算法。 Bin-packing用于在映射期间生成门分解，以避免现有方法中的分解选择预生成问题。我们的结果表明，与 ABC 中最先进的基于无损合成的映射算法相比，我们的算法平均可以减少 13% 的面积。与工业工具Vivado相比，我们可以获得平均35%的显着面积减少。

items.title: Improving I/O Performance and Fairness in NVMe SSDs With Pooling Portions of Cache Partitions.
items.abstract: Nonvolatile memory express (NVMe) solid-state drives (SSDs) have become mainstream storage devices in today’s computing systems, due to their high throughput and ultralow latency. It has been observed that the impact of interference among all concurrently running streams (i.e., I/O workloads) on their overall responsiveness differs significantly in multistream SSDs, resulting in unfairness. This article proposes a cache division management scheme built on top of the evenly partition scheme for NVMe SSDs, to enhance I/O responsiveness without consciously sacrificing fairness. To this end, we first build a mathematical model to directly cut portions from the Local cache partitions allocated to concurrently running streams, considering their run-time performance measures. Then, our approach pools these portions together for the use of all streams. As a result, each stream has its corresponding Local cache space for ensuring fairness, meanwhile the pooled Global cache space is shared by all streams for enhancing I/O responsiveness. Trace-driven simulation experiments demonstrate that our proposal reduces the overall I/O latency by up to 24.4 %, and improve the measure of fairness by \mathtt2.5× on average, in contrast to existing cache management schemes for NVMe SSDs.
items.abstract_zh: 由于其高吞吐量和超低延迟，非易失性存储器高速 (NVMe) 固态硬盘 (SSD) 已成为当今计算系统中的主流存储设备。据观察，在多流 SSD 中，所有并发运行的流（即 I/O 工作负载）之间的干扰对其整体响应能力的影响存在显着差异，从而导致不公平。本文提出了一种建立在 NVMe SSD 均匀分区方案之上的缓存分区管理方案，以在不刻意牺牲公平性的情况下增强 I/O 响应能力。为此，我们首先构建一个数学模型，考虑其运行时性能指标，直接从分配给并发运行流的本地缓存分区中剪切部分。然后，我们的方法将这些部分集中在一起以供所有流使用。因此，每个流都有其对应的本地缓存空间以确保公平性，同时池化的全局缓存空间由所有流共享以增强 I/O 响应能力。跟踪驱动的仿真实验表明，我们的建议将整体 I/O 延迟降低了高达 24.4 %，并通过 \mathtt2.5× 平均而言，与 NVMe SSD 的现有缓存管理方案相比。

items.title: Gemini+: Enhancing Real-Time Video Analytics With Dual-Image FPGAs.
items.abstract: Real-time video analytics demand intensive computing resources, often exceeding device capabilities. Heterogeneous computing resources like CPU and GPU, usually work collaboratively to ensure real-time performance. GPU manages data-intensive computing, while CPU handles instruction-intensive tasks. However, analytics accuracy can degrade because of the imbalance between CPU-GPU workloads and resources, and static resources in most systems limit adaptability to dynamic workloads. In addition to CPU-GPU resource control, accuracy is highly dependent on video analytics configuration, including resolution, frame rate, and model selection. In this article, we propose Gemini+, a hardware-accelerated video analytics pipeline empowered by dual-image FPGAs. It enables flexible CPU-GPU resource adaptation by providing near-instantaneous switching between two preconfigured images. We investigate CPU-GPU resource control and video analytics configuration adaptation in a dual-image FPGA-based video analytics pipeline. We study and formulate two problems of practical importance, a single-camera and multicamera dual computing resource control problem, i.e., SC-DCRC and MC-DCRC. We analyze the problem complexity and develop optimal and suboptimal algorithms. We evaluate our algorithms through simulation and build a prototype for verification. The results show that Gemini+ can improve analytic accuracy by 25% compared to fixed CPU-GPU resource systems and 88% compared to GPU-dominant systems.
items.abstract_zh: 实时视频分析需要密集的计算资源，通常超出设备的能力。 CPU和GPU等异构计算资源通常协同工作以确保实时性能。 GPU 管理数据密集型计算，而 CPU 处理指令密集型任务。然而，由于 CPU-GPU 工作负载和资源之间的不平衡，分析准确性可能会降低，而且大多数系统中的静态资源限制了对动态工作负载的适应性。除了 CPU-GPU 资源控制之外，准确性高度依赖于视频分析配置，包括分辨率、帧速率和模型选择。在本文中，我们提出了 Gemini+，这是一种由双图像 FPGA 支持的硬件加速视频分析管道。它通过在两个预配置图像之间提供近乎瞬时的切换来实现灵活的 CPU-GPU 资源适配。我们研究了基于双图像 FPGA 的视频分析管道中的 CPU-GPU 资源控制和视频分析配置自适应。我们研究并提出了两个具有实际意义的问题，即单摄像机和多摄像机双计算资源控制问题，即SC-DCRC和MC-DCRC。我们分析问题的复杂性并开发最佳和次优算法。我们通过模拟评估我们的算法并构建原型进行验证。结果表明，与固定CPU-GPU资源系统相比，Gemini+可以将分析精度提高25%，与GPU为主的系统相比，可以提高88%。

items.title: Delay-Driven Rectilinear Steiner Tree Construction.
items.abstract: Timing-driven routing is crucial in complex circuit design. Existing shallow-light Steiner tree construction methods balance between wire length (WL) and source-sink path length (PL) but lack in delay. Conversely, previous delay-driven methods prioritize delay but result in longer WL and PL, making them suboptimal. In this article, we show that simultaneously reducing the WL and PL can effectively reduce the delay. Furthermore, we investigate how delay changes during the reduction of PL. Guided by the theoretical findings, we develop a rectilinear shallow-light Steiner tree construction algorithm designed to reduce delay meanwhile maintaining a bounded WL. Furthermore, a delay-driven edge shifting algorithm is proposed to fine tune the tree’s topology, further reducing delay. We show that our proposed edge shifting algorithm can return a local Pareto optimal solution when repeatedly applied. Experimental results show that our algorithm achieves the lowest total delay compared to previous methods while maintaining competitive WL. Moreover, for nets with pins that have timing information, our algorithm can generate the most suitable Steiner Tree based on the timing information. In addition, extended experiments highlight the positive impact of constructing rectilinear Steiner trees with minimized total delay. Our codes will be available at https://github.com/Whx97/Delay-driven-Steiner-Tree .
items.abstract_zh: 时序驱动布线在复杂电路设计中至关重要。现有的浅光斯坦纳树构建方法平衡了线长度（WL）和源-汇路径长度（PL），但缺乏延迟。相反，以前的延迟驱动方法优先考虑延迟，但会导致 WL 和 PL 更长，从而使其不是最优的。在本文中，我们证明同时降低 WL 和 PL 可以有效降低延迟。此外，我们还研究了 PL 减少期间延迟如何变化。在理论研究结果的指导下，我们开发了一种直线浅光斯坦纳树构造算法，旨在减少延迟，同时保持有界的 WL。此外，提出了一种延迟驱动的边缘移位算法来微调树的拓扑，进一步减少延迟。我们表明，我们提出的边缘移位算法在重复应用时可以返回局部帕累托最优解。实验结果表明，与之前的方法相比，我们的算法实现了最低的总延迟，同时保持了有竞争力的 WL。此外，对于具有时序信息的引脚的网络，我们的算法可以根据时序信息生成最合适的斯坦纳树。此外，扩展实验强调了以最小化总延迟构建直线斯坦纳树的积极影响。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/Whx97/Delay-driven-Steiner-Tree 获取。

items.title: Efficient Design Optimization for Diffractive Deep Neural Networks.
items.abstract: Since diffractive deep neural network (D2NN) provides a full optical solution to implement deep neural networks (DNNs), it offers ultrafast operation speed and virtually unlimited bandwidth, yielding an alternative-yet-competitive approach for computer-based neural networks. A D2NN is composed of several 3D-printed phase masks as hidden layers and a number of optical detectors at the output. To enable automatic and efficient design of D2NNs, we propose an iterative optimization method to determine the optimal design parameters of D2NNs. During each iteration step, we first optimize the physical parameters for masks (e.g., thicknesses) while fixing the detector parameters (e.g., locations). Next, we exhaustively search the detector parameters with fixed masks. These two steps are repeated until convergence is reached. Our numerical experiments demonstrate that the proposed optimization algorithm can produce a high-performance D2NN achieving 97% accuracy for recognizing handwritten digits.
items.abstract_zh: 由于衍射深度神经网络 (D2NN) 提供了实现深度神经网络 (DNN) 的完整光学解决方案，因此它提供超快的运行速度和几乎无限的带宽，为基于计算机的神经网络提供了一种替代但具有竞争力的方法。 D2NN 由多个 3D 打印的相位掩模作为隐藏层和多个输出光学探测器组成。为了实现 D2NN 的自动高效设计，我们提出了一种迭代优化方法来确定 D2NN 的最佳设计参数。在每个迭代步骤中，我们首先优化掩模的物理参数（例如厚度），同时固定探测器参数（例如位置）。接下来，我们用固定掩模详尽地搜索检测器参数。重复这两个步骤直到达到收敛。我们的数值实验表明，所提出的优化算法可以产生高性能的 D2NN，识别手写数字的准确率达到 97%。

items.title: FADESIM: Enable Fast and Accurate Design Exploration for Memristive Accelerators Considering Nonidealities.
items.abstract: Memristive accelerators (MAs), built with memristive crossbar arrays (MCAs), have gained significant attention for their ability to efficiently perform matrix-vector multiplication in diverse applications. Modeling and simulation are indispensable tools for exploring and evaluating architectural design. Specifically, for MAs, maintaining high computation accuracy has been challenging because of realistic nonidealities like wire resistance (i.e., IR drop), I–V nonlinearity, program variation, and so on. Thus, for the system architects, fast and exact analysis of the effects of nonidealities is highly desirable, especially during the vast early design space exploration of the architecture. However, the SPICE model and existing MCA compact models (CMs) do not offer acceptable speeds for accurate simulation purposes, making them less practical. Additionally, the existing MCA simplified circuit models and predictive models fail to produce effective results due to the complexity of IR drop, let alone the coupling of multiple nonidealities. To enable fast and accurate design exploration for MAs with nonidealities considered, in this article, we propose FADESIM which includes fast IR drop simulation methods and a processing chain for the joint simulation of multiple nonidealities. Starting with the analysis of the accurate CM for IR drop, we explore the special properties of the model to enable fast iterative methods as well as a method to skip invalid calculations. This significantly reduces the time complexity of the simulation from naive O(n^6) to O(n^3) . For less severe IR drop cases, a custom iterative update algorithm is presented for faster simulations as a supplement, specifically with a time complexity of near O(n^2) and proven applicable conditions. To simulate multiple nonidealities, we introduce a processing chain to inject corresponding processing functions before, during, and after the proposed fast IR drop simulation process according to the stages at which nonidealities take effect. The array-level experimental results show that our method achieves accurate simulations, with 19.8 × - 884.9 × faster and 276.7 × - 8018.8 × reduced memory usage compared to SPICE simulation. Further experiments at the algorithm-level demonstrate the effectiveness of our method in assisting architects with evaluating their designs.
items.abstract_zh: 采用忆阻交叉阵列 (MCA) 构建的忆阻加速器 (MA) 因其在各种应用中高效执行矩阵向量乘法的能力而受到广泛关注。建模和仿真是探索和评估建筑设计不可或缺的工具。具体来说，对于 MA 而言，由于存在诸如线阻（即 IR 压降）、I-V 非线性、程序变化等现实非理想因素，保持高计算精度一直具有挑战性。因此，对于系统架构师来说，快速而准确地分析非理想性的影响是非常必要的，特别是在架构的早期设计空间探索期间。然而，SPICE 模型和现有的 MCA 紧凑模型 (CM) 无法提供用于精确仿真目的的可接受的速度，这使得它们不太实用。此外，由于IR drop的复杂性，现有的MCA简化电路模型和预测模型无法产生有效的结果，更不用说多个非理想的耦合了。为了实现考虑非理想性的 MA 的快速、准确的设计探索，在本文中，我们提出了 FADESIM，其中包括快速 IR 压降仿真方法和用于多个非理想性联合仿真的处理链。从分析 IR 压降的精确 CM 开始，我们探索了模型的特殊属性，以实现快速迭代方法以及跳过无效计算的方法。这显着降低了模拟的时间复杂度，从简单的 O(n^6) 到 O(n^3) 。对于不太严重的 IR 下降情况，提供了一种自定义迭代更新算法作为补充，以实现更快的模拟，特别是时间复杂度接近 O(n^2) 和经过验证的适用条件。为了模拟多个非理想性，我们引入了一个处理链，根据非理想性生效的阶段，在所提出的快速 IR 压降模拟过程之前、期间和之后注入相应的处理函数。数组级实验结果表明，我们的方法实现了精确的模拟， 19.8 × - 884.9 × 更快， 276.7 × - 8018.8 × $与 SPICE 模拟相比， 减少了内存使用量。算法级别的进一步实验证明了我们的方法在协助建筑师评估其设计方面的有效性。

items.title: POFGSP: Priority-Based Out-of-Order Scheduling and Fine-Grain Status Polling for SSD Performance Improvement.
items.abstract: With the development of flash technology, the increasing throughput gap between nand flash memory (NFM) arrays and the I/O interface has become a performance bottleneck for NFM-based solid-state drives (SSDs). Multilevel parallelism techniques have been employed on modern SSDs to meet the challenge of increasing demands for bandwidth in I/O-intensive workloads. However, conventional parallel methods only monitor the status of ways, resulting in the “idle bubble”—idle time of the dies cannot execute subsequent operations until all the dies in the way complete command execution. This issue limits the resource utilization and performance of SSDs. To minimize the idle bubble, we propose priority-based out-of-order scheduling and fine-grain status polling (POFGSP). The priority-based out-of-order scheduling relaxes constraints on command execution order and schedules commands with the same execution time to be executed in parallel. Therefore, the scheduler reduces these idle bubbles caused by differences in command execution times. Moreover, the fine-grain status polling approach polls the die-level status during the interface’s idle time, reducing idle bubbles with accurate status. Compared to state-of-the-art schedulers, our POFGSP approach can reduce request response time by 35.6% under real-world cloud block storage workloads and improve the SSD system’s maximum bandwidth by 8.7%–74.9%.
items.abstract_zh: 随着闪存技术的发展，nand 闪存（NFM）阵列与I/O接口之间的吞吐量差距越来越大，已成为基于NFM的固态硬盘（SSD）的性能瓶颈。现代 SSD 已采用多级并行技术来应对 I/O 密集型工作负载中带宽需求不断增长的挑战。然而，传统的并行方法仅监视路的状态，从而导致“空闲泡沫”——空闲时的芯片无法执行后续操作，直到路中的所有芯片完成命令执行。这个问题限制了SSD的资源利用率和性能。为了最大限度地减少空闲泡沫，我们提出了基于优先级的无序调度和细粒度状态轮询（POFGSP）。基于优先级的乱序调度放宽了对命令执行顺序的限制，将执行时间相同的命令调度为并行执行。因此，调度程序减少了这些由于命令执行时间差异而导致的空闲气泡。此外，细粒度状态轮询方法在接口空闲时间内轮询芯片级状态，以准确的状态减少空闲气泡。与最先进的调度程序相比，我们的 POFGSP 方法可以在实际云块存储工作负载下将请求响应时间减少 35.6%，并将 SSD 系统的最大带宽提高 8.7%–74.9%。

items.title: Prior-Boosted GRL: Microarchitecture Design Space Exploration via Graph Representation Learning.
items.abstract: The design space exploration (DSE) of contemporary microprocessors faces a significant challenge of high-computational cost. In this context, we introduce Prior-boosted graph representation learning (GRL), a novel framework for the DSE of the microarchitectures the microprocessors underpinned by graph embeddings. Using GRL, Prior-boosted GRL constructs a compact and continuous vector space for design representation. This framework is further boosted by an efficient sampling algorithm informed by prior knowledge, which is instrumental in generating a superior set of initial designs to accelerate the exploration process. A well-designed ensemble surrogate model is combined with the multiobjective Bayesian optimization to explore the design space holistically within this graph-embedding domain. Rigorous experimental evaluations conducted on the RISC-V Berkeley-Out-of-Order Machine (BOOM) platform demonstrate that Prior-boosted GRL substantially surpasses preceding methods, achieving a 107.79% enhancement in Pareto front quality compared to the state-of-the-art DSE algorithm. It also outstrips manual designs on performance, power, and area metrics. As of this writing, Prior-boosted GRL holds the first place in the ICCAD 2022 CAD Contest evaluation platform.
items.abstract_zh: 当代微处理器的设计空间探索（DSE）面临着高计算成本的重大挑战。在这种背景下，我们引入了 Prior-boosted 图表示学习（GRL），这是一种用于微架构 DSE 的新颖框架，该微架构以图嵌入为基础。使用 GRL，Prior-boosted GRL 构建了一个紧凑且连续的向量空间用于设计表示。基于先验知识的高效采样算法进一步推动了该框架，这有助于生成一组优秀的初始设计以加速探索过程。精心设计的集成代理模型与多目标贝叶斯优化相结合，在该图嵌入域内全面探索设计空间。在 RISC-V Berkeley-Out-of-Order Machine (BOOM) 平台上进行的严格实验评估表明，Prior-boosted GRL 大幅超越了之前的方法，与最先进的 DSE 算法相比，Pareto 前沿质量提高了 107.79%。它在性能、功耗和面积指标方面也超越了手动设计。截至撰写本文时，Prior-boosted GRL 在 ICCAD 2022 CAD 竞赛评估平台中保持第一名。

items.title: Exploiting the Memory-Compute-Coupling Feature for CIM Accelerator Design Optimization.
items.abstract: SRAM computing-in-memory (CIM) accelerators have evolved as a promising solution to the memory wall problem in neural network (NN) models. By integrating memory and compute resources in each macro, CIM accelerators offer massive in-situ computing parallelism and large memory capacity, enabling spatial mapping with layer fusion and potentially keeping layers stationary in CIM. However, CIM’s memory-compute coupling (MCC) feature poses challenges in designing CIM accelerators. From an architecture aspect, designers must balance CIM’s memory and compute resources by optimizing the macro’s memory-compute ratio (MCR) configuration across diverse scenarios. From a mapping aspect, conventional mappings, which allocate each macro exclusively to each layer, face two major problems: 1) a layer-fusion dilemma (the accelerator suffers from excessive memory access due to layer replications or performance degradation due to load imbalance) and 2) a layer-eviction issue (storing layers stationary in CIM is usually infeasible due to limited CIM capacity). To address these challenges, this article introduces MCC-DSE, an MCC-aware Design Space Exploration framework for architecture-mapping co-optimization of CIM accelerators. We also propose a three-axis CIM division mapping, which interleaves multiple layers in each macro to concurrently optimize memory access and performance during layer fusion as well as reserves a part of CIM memory in each macro for layer pinning. Compared to baseline architecture and mapping, MCC-DSE shows a 1.4× – 8.3× EDP reduction across various workloads and chip areas.
items.abstract_zh: SRAM 内存计算 (CIM) 加速器已发展成为神经网络 (NN) 模型中内存墙问题的一种有前景的解决方案。通过在每个宏中集成内存和计算资源，CIM 加速器提供大规模原位计算并行性和大内存容量，从而实现具有层融合的空间映射，并有可能在 CIM 中保持层固定。然而，CIM 的内存计算耦合 (MCC) 功能给 CIM 加速器的设计带来了挑战。从架构方面来看，设计人员必须通过跨不同场景优化宏的内存计算比（MCR）配置来平衡 CIM 的内存和计算资源。从映射方面来看，将每个宏专门分配给每一层的传统映射面临两个主要问题：1）层融合困境（由于层复制或负载不平衡导致的性能下降，加速器遭受过多的内存访问）和2）层驱逐问题（由于CIM容量有限，在CIM中固定存储层通常是不可行的）。为了应对这些挑战，本文介绍了 MCC-DSE，这是一种 MCC 感知设计空间探索框架，用于 CIM 加速器的架构映射协同优化。我们还提出了一种三轴 CIM 划分映射，它在每个宏中交错多个层，以在层融合期间同时优化内存访问和性能，并在每个宏中保留一部分 CIM 内存用于层固定。与基线架构和映射相比，MCC-DSE 显示 1.4× – 8.3× 各种工作负载和芯片领域的 EDP 减少。

items.title: Catch the Star: Weight Recovery Attack Using Side-Channel Star Map Against DNN Accelerator.
items.abstract: The rapid development of Artificial Intelligence (AI) technology must be connected to the arithmetic support of high-performance hardware. However, when the deep neural network (DNN) accelerator performs inference tasks at the edge end, the sensitive data of DNN will generate leakage through side-channel information. The adversary can recover the model structure and weight parameters of DNN by using the side-channel information, which seriously affects the protection of necessary intellectual property (IP) of DNN, so the hardware security of the DNN accelerator is critical. In the current research of Side-channel attack (SCA) for matrix multiplication units, such as systolic arrays, the linear multiplication operation leads to a more extensive weights search space for the SCA, and extracting all the weight parameters requires higher attack conditions. This article proposes a new power SCA method, which includes a Collision-Correlation Power Analysis (Collision-CPA) and Correlation-based Weight Search Algorithm (C-WSA) to address the problem. The Collision-CPA reduces the attack conditions for the SCA by building multiple Hamming Distance (HD)-based power leakage models for the systolic array. Meanwhile, the C-WSA dramatically reduces the weights search space. In addition, the concept of a Side-channel star map (SCSM) is proposed for the first time in this article, and the adversary can quickly and accurately locate the correct weight information in the SCSM. Through experiments, we recover all the weight parameters of a 3× 3 systolic array based on 100000 power traces, in which the weight search space is reduced by up to 97.7%. For the DNN accelerator at the edge, especially the systolic array structure, our proposed novel SCA aligns more with practical attack scenarios, with lower attack conditions, and higher attack efficiency.
items.abstract_zh: 人工智能（AI）技术的快速发展必须离不开高性能硬件的算术支持。然而，当深度神经网络（DNN）加速器在边缘端执行推理任务时，DNN的敏感数据会通过侧通道信息产生泄漏。攻击者可以利用旁路信息恢复DNN的模型结构和权重参数，严重影响DNN必要知识产权（IP）的保护，因此DNN加速器的硬件安全至关重要。在当前针对脉动阵列等矩阵乘法单元的侧信道攻击（SCA）研究中，线性乘法运算导致SCA的权值搜索空间更加广泛，并且提取所有权值参数需要更高的攻击条件。本文提出了一种新的功率SCA方法，其中包括碰撞相关功率分析（Collision-CPA）和基于相关的权重搜索算法（C-WSA）来解决该问题。 Collision-CPA 通过为脉动阵列构建多个基于汉明距离 (HD) 的功率泄漏模型来减少 SCA 的攻击条件。同时，C-WSA 极大地减少了权重搜索空间。此外，本文首次提出了侧通道星图（SCSM）的概念，对手可以快速准确地定位SCSM中的正确权重信息。通过实验，我们恢复了基于100000的 3× 3 脉动数组的所有权重参数功率轨迹，其中权重搜索空间减少高达 97.7%。对于边缘的DNN加速器，特别是脉动阵列结构，我们提出的新型SCA更符合实际攻击场景，攻击条件更低，攻击效率更高。

items.title: SRAM Periphery Testing Using the Cell-Aware Test Methodology.
items.abstract: Testing memory circuits is crucial for ensuring the quality and reliability of system-on-chip (SoC) designs, especially as shrinking technology nodes increase susceptibility to nanometer-scale defects. This article introduces an enhanced methodology for memory testing, leveraging the cell-aware (CA) test concept. Building on prior work for SRAM array testing (Xhafa et al., 2023), we extend the CA methodology to include periphery testing by generating, for the first time, CA models for each memory input–output (I/O) element, covering key components, such as address decoders, write drivers, and sense amplifiers. We present results from testing these periphery components using the CA methodology. Additionally, we compare existing SRAM testing techniques with our CA methodology for the decoder and I/O circuitry. To ensure a fair comparison, we selected minimal March tests designed to detect functional faults in peripheral circuits, aligning with the fault models targeted by our approach. A quantitative analysis of fault coverage demonstrates the effectiveness of our methodology compared to March algorithms, particularly in terms of test complexity.
items.abstract_zh: 测试内存电路对于确保片上系统 (SoC) 设计的质量和可靠性至关重要，尤其是在缩小技术节点增加对纳米级缺陷的敏感性的情况下。本文介绍了一种利用单元感知 (CA) 测试概念的增强型内存测试方法。在 SRAM 阵列测试的先前工作（Xhafa 等人，2023）的基础上，我们首次为每个存储器输入输出 (I/O) 元件生成 CA 模型，将 CA 方法扩展到包括外围测试，涵盖关键组件，例如地址解码器、写入驱动器和感应放大器。我们展示使用 CA 方法测试这些外围组件的结果。此外，我们还将现有的 SRAM 测试技术与解码器和 I/O 电路的 CA 方法进行比较。为了确保公平比较，我们选择了最少的三月测试，旨在检测外围电路中的功能故障，与我们的方法所针对的故障模型保持一致。与 March 算法相比，故障覆盖率的定量分析证明了我们的方法的有效性，特别是在测试复杂性方面。

items.title: HTs-GCN: Identifying Hardware Trojan Nodes in Integrated Circuits Using a Graph Convolutional Network.
items.abstract: Hardware Trojans (HTs) present significant security threats to integrated circuits. Detecting and locating HTs is crucial for mitigating these threats. Thus, this article proposes a method called HTs-GCN, which utilizes a graph convolutional network (GCN) to identify HTs. First, it extracts two novel features of gate nodes using a depth-first search strategy and topological logical analysis to enrich the feature information of circuit nodes. Second, through a message-passing mechanism, it designs a local feature aggregation method based on the GCN and a global feature fusion method based on an attention mechanism to improve the representation capability of circuit node features. Then, leveraging the concept of stochastic gradient descent and incorporating mini-batch oversampling and under-sampling techniques, it employs a dataset imbalance handling method to address the scarcity of HT nodes in circuits. These approaches significantly enhance the distinguishability between gate nodes with HTs and other gate nodes while reducing computational complexity. Experimental results indicate that HTs-GCN outperforms the recently proposed NHTD-GL method in terms of recall: it achieves approximately 7.8% points higher recall while maintaining similar accuracy. HTs-GCN demonstrates exceptional generalizability, with an average recall and accuracy of 93.0% and 100%, respectively, on infrequently used circuits in the Trust-Hub benchmark. In addition, on the TRIT-TC benchmark, HTs-GCN achieves excellent average true positive rate (TPR) and true negative rate (TNR) of 95.1% and 94.4%, respectively. Furthermore, HTs-GCN exhibits robust performance under gate modification attacks, with average TPR and TNR reaching 82.1% and 92.5%, respectively.
items.abstract_zh: 硬件木马 (HT) 对集成电路构成重大安全威胁。检测和定位 HT 对于减轻这些威胁至关重要。因此，本文提出了一种称为 HTs-GCN 的方法，该方法利用图卷积网络（GCN）来识别 HT。首先，利用深度优先搜索策略和拓扑逻辑分析提取门节点的两个新特征，以丰富电路节点的特征信息。其次，通过消息传递机制，设计了基于GCN的局部特征聚合方法和基于注意力机制的全局特征融合方法，以提高电路节点特征的表示能力。然后，利用随机梯度下降的概念并结合小批量过采样和欠采样技术，采用数据集不平衡处理方法来解决电路中HT节点的稀缺问题。这些方法显着增强了具有 HT 的门节点与其他门节点之间的可区分性，同时降低了计算复杂性。实验结果表明，HTs-GCN 在召回率方面优于最近提出的 NHTD-GL 方法：在保持相似准确率的同时，召回率提高了约 7.8%。 HTs-GCN 表现出卓越的通用性，在 Trust-Hub 基准测试中不常用的电路上，平均召回率和准确率分别为 93.0% 和 100%。此外，在 TRIT-TC 基准​​上，HTs-GCN 的平均真阳性率（TPR）和真阴性率（TNR）分别达到 95.1% 和 94.4%。此外，HTs-GCN在门修改攻击下表现出强大的性能，平均TPR和TNR分别达到82.1%和92.5%。

items.title: ChainPIM: A ReRAM-Based Processing-in-Memory Accelerator for HGNNs via Chain Structure.
items.abstract: Heterogeneous graph neural networks (HGNNs) have recently demonstrated significant advantages of capturing powerful structural and semantic information in heterogeneous graphs. Different from homogeneous graph neural networks directly aggregating information based on neighbors, HGNNs aggregate information based on complex metapaths. ReRAM-based processing-in-memory (PIM) architecture can reduce data movement and compute matrix-vector multiplication (MVM) in analog. It can be well used to accelerate HGNNs. However, the complex metapath-based aggregation of HGNNs makes it challenging to efficiently utilize the parallelism of ReRAM and vertices data reuse. To this end, we propose ChainPIM, the first ReRAM-based processing-in-memory accelerator for HGNNs featuring high-computing parallelism and vertices data reuse. Specifically, we introduce R-chain, which is based on a chain structure to build related metapath instances together. We can efficiently reuse vertices through R-chain and process different R-chains in parallel. Then, we further design an efficient storage format for storing R-chains, which reduces a lot of repeated vertices storage. Finally, a specialized ReRAM-based architecture is developed to pipeline different types of aggregations in HGNNs, fully exploiting the huge potential of multilevel parallelism in HGNNs. Our experiments show that ChainPIM achieves an average memory space reduction of 47.86% and performance improvement by 128.29× compared to NVIDIA Tesla V100 GPU.
items.abstract_zh: 异构图神经网络（HGNN）最近展示了在异构图中捕获强大的结构和语义信息的显着优势。与同质图神经网络直接基于邻居聚合信息不同，HGNN 基于复杂的元路径聚合信息。基于 ReRAM 的内存处理 (PIM) 架构可以减少数据移动并以模拟方式计算矩阵向量乘法 (MVM)。它可以很好地用于加速 HGNN。然而，HGNN 复杂的基于元路径的聚合使得有效利用 ReRAM 的并行性和顶点数据重用变得具有挑战性。为此，我们提出了 ChainPIM，这是第一个基于 ReRAM 的 HGNN 内存处理加速器，具有高计算并行性和顶点数据重用性。具体来说，我们引入R-chain，它基于链式结构来共同构建相关的元路径实例。我们可以通过 R 链有效地重用顶点并并行处理不同的 R 链。然后，我们进一步设计了一种高效的存储格式来存储R链，减少了大量重复的顶点存储。最后，开发了一种专门的基于 ReRAM 的架构，用于在 HGNN 中管道化不同类型的聚合，充分利用 HGNN 中多级并行性的巨大潜力。我们的实验表明，ChainPIM 平均内存空间减少了 47.86%，性能提升了 128.29× 与 NVIDIA Tesla V100 GPU 相比。

items.title: Less Traces Are All It Takes: Efficient Side-Channel Analysis on AES.
items.abstract: In cryptography, side-channel analysis (SCA) is a technique used to recover cryptographic keys by examining the physical leakages that occur during the operation of cryptographic devices. Recent advancements in deep learning (DL) have greatly enhanced the extraction of crucial information from intricate leakage patterns. A considerable amount of research is dedicated to studying the SubByte (SB) operations of the advanced encryption standard (AES). This is because the SB process, which generates numerous transitions between 0s and 1s during encryption, results in significant energy leakage. However, traditional analysis models primarily focus on the initial round of SB operations in AES, which are less effective on mobile terminals where it is difficult to collect enough signals. These models often neglect additional operations and subsequent rounds, thus providing limited insights from small datasets. Consequently, this limitation has a direct impact on the accuracy and efficiency of key recovery. Our study uses \rho -test analysis to show that significant leakage occurs not only during the S-box operation but also during the AddRoundKey (AR) phase of AES. To address these challenges, we propose a new SCA method, that is, optimized for small sample sizes. This method includes a new comprehensive round trace labeling algorithm, which simultaneously analyzes the SB and AR stages of each AES round. Additionally, we introduce the peak precise localization algorithm to accurately identify the points of energy leakage during each encryption round. Our experiments, conducted with power and electromagnetic (EM) datasets from the STM32F303 microcontroller, demonstrate that our method can reliably recover keys with as few as 20 traces. These results highlight the enhanced capability of our method in handling the complexities of small sample datasets in cryptographic analysis.
items.abstract_zh: 在密码学中，旁路分析 (SCA) 是一种通过检查密码设备运行期间发生的物理泄漏来恢复密码密钥的技术。深度学习 (DL) 的最新进展极大地增强了从复杂泄漏模式中提取关键信息的能力。大量研究致力于研究高级加密标准 (AES) 的 SubByte (SB) 操作。这是因为 SB 过程会在加密过程中产生大量 0 和 1 之间的转换，从而导致严重的能量泄漏。然而，传统的分析模型主要集中在AES中的第一轮SB操作，这在移动终端上效果较差，难以收集到足够的信号。这些模型通常忽略额外的操作和后续轮次，因此从小数据集中提供的见解有限。因此，这种限制直接影响密钥恢复的准确性和效率。我们的研究使用 \rho -测试分析表明，不仅在 S-box 操作期间，而且在 AddRoundKey 期间都发生了明显的泄漏AES 的 (AR) 阶段。为了应对这些挑战，我们提出了一种新的 SCA 方法，即针对小样本量进行优化。该方法包括一种新的综合回合跟踪标记算法，该算法可同时分析每个 AES 回合的 SB 和 AR 阶段。此外，我们引入了峰值精确定位算法来准确识别每轮加密期间的能量泄漏点。我们使用 STM32F303 微控制器的功率和电磁 (EM) 数据集进行的实验表明，我们的方法可以用少至 20 条迹线可靠地恢复密钥。这些结果凸显了我们的方法在处理密码分析中小样本数据集的复杂性方面的增强能力。

items.title: A Data-Driven Stochastic Memristor Model for Integrated Circuit Simulation.
items.abstract: Memristors have emerged as promising candidates for multilevel data storage, in-memory processing, and neural networks since their intrinsic programmability of resistance states under applied stimuli has been well revealed in memristor modeling. However, the programming uncertainty arising from the inherently stochastic nature of the device itself has been overlooked in previous modeling approaches. This omission hinders the incorporation of memristor stochasticity into time-domain circuit simulation. To address this issue, we propose a behavior model that incorporates real-time programming stochasticity. Our model stands out for several attributes: 1) programming stochasticity is included and exhibited in its resistance change over time; 2) its stochastic behavior is depicted by the summation of its deterministic behaviors and a noise signal; and 3) both deterministic behaviors and noise amplitudes depending on the pulse amplitude v and the memristor resistance R are determined by sufficient characterization data of our in-house TiO2 devices in a data-driven method. Consequently, our model is validated as highly matched to the characterized memristor device in terms of time-domain resistance evolution. Additionally, the modeling process can be adapted to different memristors with significant device variations. Furthermore, the model is transformed into the standard Verilog-A style for in-circuit simulation. To demonstrate its compatibility with system-level circuit simulation, a mixed-signal CMOS circuit is designed. This circuit explores the feasibility of storing multibit data within a single memristor, while considering its stochasticity.
items.abstract_zh: 忆阻器已成为多级数据存储、内存处理和神经网络的有希望的候选者，因为忆阻器模型在忆阻器建模中很好地揭示了它们在施加刺激下电阻状态的内在可编程性。然而，在以前的建模方法中，忽略了由于设备本身固有的随机性而产生的编程不确定性。这一遗漏阻碍了忆阻器随机性纳入时域电路仿真。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种包含实时编程随机性的行为模型。我们的模型具有以下几个特点：1）编程随机性包含在内，并表现在其电阻随时间的变化中； 2) 其随机行为由其确定性行为和噪声信号的总和来描述； 3) 取决于脉冲幅度 v 和忆阻器电阻 R 的确定性行为和噪声幅度均由我们内部 TiO2 器件的充分表征数据以数据驱动的方法确定。因此，我们的模型被验证为在时域电阻演化方面与特征忆阻器器件高度匹配。此外，建模过程可以适应具有显着器件变化的不同忆阻器。此外，该模型被转换为用于在线仿真的标准Verilog-A风格。为了证明其与系统级电路仿真的兼容性，设计了混合信号CMOS电路。该电路探讨了在单个忆阻器内存储多位数据的可行性，同时考虑其随机性。

items.title: A New Verilog-A SPAD Circuit Model Integrating Crosstalk for Large-Scale Array.
items.abstract: Single photon avalanche diode (SPAD) is an optoelectronic conversion device with excellent detection sensitivity and extremely high gain. With the increase of SPAD array scale, crosstalk has become an urgent problem to improve the signal-to-noise ratio in SPAD circuit design. However, there is still a lack of SPAD array circuit models that can be used for circuit simulators and describe crosstalk to optimize circuits. To this end, this article proposed a new structure of single pixel SPAD model, which responds to interference from surrounding pixels using current controlled switch and current controlled current source. Based on the single pixel model and theoretical analysis, a SPAD array circuit model that can describe crosstalk is established, successfully expanding the SPAD circuit model from single pixel to array. This model is described by Verilog-A and can be directly implemented in commercial circuit simulators. The developed model was simulated and validated using a gate controlled mode active quenching circuit. The experimental results show that the simulation results are in good agreement with theoretical and measured data, and have excellent adaptability to SPAD arrays with different structures. In most cases, the simulation error does not exceed 10%, which verifies the accuracy of the established SPAD array circuit model. This model is helpful for achieving collaborative design of circuits and large-scale SPAD array.
items.abstract_zh: 单光子雪崩二极管（SPAD）是一种具有优异检测灵敏度和极高增益的光电转换器件。随着SPAD阵列规模的增大，串扰已成为SPAD电路设计中提高信噪比亟待解决的问题。然而，目前仍然缺乏可用于电路仿真和描述串扰以优化电路的SPAD阵列电路模型。为此，本文提出了一种新的单像素SPAD模型结构，利用电流控制开关和电流控制电流源来响应周围像素的干扰。基于单像素模型和理论分析，建立了能够描述串扰的SPAD阵列电路模型，成功地将SPAD电路模型从单像素扩展到阵列。该模型由Verilog-A描述，可以直接在商业电路模拟器中实现。使用门控模式有源猝灭电路对开发的模型进行了仿真和验证。实验结果表明，仿真结果与理论和实测数据吻合较好，对不同结构的SPAD阵列具有良好的适应性。大多数情况下仿真误差不超过10%，验证了所建立的SPAD阵列电路模型的准确性。该模型有助于实现电路和大规模SPAD阵列的协同设计。

items.title: Tri-HD: Energy-Efficient On-Chip Learning With In-Memory Hyperdimensional Computing.
items.abstract: The Internet of Things (IoT) has led to the emergence of big data. Processing this data, specially in learning algorithms, poses a challenge for current embedded computing systems. Brain-inspired hyperdimensional (HD) computing reduces several complex learning operations to simpler bitwise and arithmetic operations. However, it requires the use of large dimensional vectors, hypervectors, further increasing the amount of data to be processed. Processing in-memory (PIM) enables in-place computation which reduces data movement, a major latency bottleneck in conventional systems. In this article, we propose Tri-HD, an in-memory HD computing architecture that performs HD classification in memory. To the best of authors’ knowledge, Tri-HD is the first ReRAM PIM architecture to implement the complete HD computing-based classification pipeline, including encoding, training, retraining, and inference for nonbinary data. We also propose a novel distance metric that is PIM-friendly and provides similar application accuracy as the more complex baseline metric. Our proposed architecture is enabled in PIM by fast and energy-efficient in-memory logic operations. We exploit the voltage threshold-based memristors to enable single cycle operations. We also increase the amount of in-memory parallelism in our design by segmenting bitlines using switches. Our evaluation shows that for all applications tested using HD, Tri-HD provides on average 434× ( 2170× ) speedup and consumes 4114× ( 26019× ) less energy as compared to the CPU while running end-to-end HD training (inference). Tri-HD also achieves at least 2.2% higher-classification accuracy than the existing PIM-based HD designs.
items.abstract_zh: 物联网（IoT）导致了大数据的出现。处理这些数据，特别是在学习算法中，对当前的嵌入式计算系统提出了挑战。受大脑启发的超维（HD）计算将一些复杂的学习操作简化为更简单的按位和算术运算。然而，它需要使用大维向量、超向量，进一步增加了需要处理的数据量。内存处理 (PIM) 支持就地计算，从而减少数据移动，而数据移动是传统系统中的主要延迟瓶颈。在本文中，我们提出了 Tri-HD，一种内存中高清计算架构，可在内存中执行高清分类。据作者所知，Tri-HD 是第一个实现完整的基于 HD 计算的分类管道的 ReRAM PIM 架构，包括非二进制数据的编码、训练、再训练和推理。我们还提出了一种新颖的距离度量，它对 PIM 友好，并提供与更复杂的基线度量类似的应用准确性。我们提出的架构通过快速且节能的内存逻辑操作在 PIM 中实现。我们利用基于电压阈值的忆阻器来实现单周期操作。我们还通过使用开关对位线进行分段来增加设计中的内存并行度。我们的评估表明，对于使用 HD 测试的所有应用程序，Tri-HD 平均提供 434× ( 2170× ) 加速并消耗 4114× ( 26019× ) 在运行端到端 HD 训练（推理）时，与 CPU 相比能耗更少。 Tri-HD 的分类精度比现有基于 PIM 的 HD 设计至少高出 2.2%。

items.title: A Novel HDL Code Generator for Effectively Testing FPGA Logic Synthesis Compilers.
items.abstract: Field programmable gate array (FPGA) logic synthesis compilers (e.g., Vivado, Iverilog, Yosys, and Quartus) are widely applied in electronic design automation (EDA), such as the development of FPGA programs. However, defects (e.g., incorrect synthesis) in logic synthesis compilers may lead to unexpected behaviors in target applications, posing security risks. Therefore, it is crucial to thoroughly test logic synthesis compilers to eliminate such defects. Despite several hardware design language (HDL) code generators (e.g., Verismith) having been proposed to find defects in logic synthesis compilers, the effectiveness of these generators is still limited by the simple code generation strategy and the monogeneity of the generated HDL code. This article proposes EvoHDL, a novel method to generate syntax-valid HDL code for comprehensively testing FPGA logic synthesis compilers. EvoHDL can generate more complex and diverse defect-triggering HDL code (e.g., Verilog, VHDL, and SystemVerilog) by leveraging the guidance of abstract syntax tree and the extensive function block libraries of cyber-physical systems. Extensive experiments show that the diversity and defect-triggering capability of HDL code generated by EvoHDL are significantly better than the state-of-the-art method (i.e., Verismith). In three months, EvoHDL has reported 20 new defects-many of which are deep and important; 16 of them have been confirmed.
items.abstract_zh: 现场可编程门阵列（FPGA）逻辑综合编译器（例如Vivado、Iverilog、Yosys和Quartus）广泛应用于电子设计自动化（EDA），例如FPGA程序的开发。然而，逻辑综合编译器中的缺陷（例如，不正确的综合）可能会导致目标应用程序出现意外行为，从而带来安全风险。因此，彻底测试逻辑综合编译器以消除此类缺陷至关重要。尽管已经提出了几种硬件设计语言（HDL）代码生成器（例如，Verismith）来查找逻辑综合编译器中的缺陷，但这些生成器的有效性仍然受到简单的代码生成策略和生成的 HDL 代码的单一性的限制。本文提出了 EvoHDL，这是一种生成语法有效的 HDL 代码的新方法，用于全面测试 FPGA 逻辑综合编译器。 EvoHDL 利用抽象语法树和信息物理系统的广泛功能块库的指导，可以生成更复杂、更多样化的缺陷触发 HDL 代码（例如 Verilog、VHDL 和 SystemVerilog）。大量实验表明，EvoHDL 生成的 HDL 代码的多样性和缺陷触发能力明显优于最先进的方法（即 Verismith）。三个月内，EvoHDL 报告了 20 个新缺陷，其中许多缺陷很深且很重要；其中16人已得到确认。

items.title: CodePM: Parity-Based Crash Consistency for Log-Free Persistent Transactional Memory.
items.abstract: Emerging persistent memory (PM) can provide large persistent capacity with performance comparable to DRAM in modern memory systems. Persistent transactional memory (PTM) needs to ensure data consistency after unexpected power loss or crashes. Therefore, crash consistency strategies, such as persistent logging, are still required. However, the additional overhead introduced by these strategies, such as significant extra writes on PM, can lead to system performance degradation. In this article, we propose CodePM, a fault-tolerant PM transactional library that utilizes parity-based crash consistency to remove logging overhead while guaranteeing the correct state of data. CodePM reuses the decoding capability of parity to detect and recover inconsistent objects. To ensure consistency without logs when updating, CodePM employs fine-grained memory fences to carefully align potential inconsistency with the repairability of parity. To detect inconsistency without logs when recovering, CodePM utilizes optimistic speculative scanning recovery by reusing checksum and parity, which supports instant recovery with transient degraded reliability. Moreover, we study the memory fence blocking effects and further augment CodePM with pipelined encoding and persistent writing to hide update latency. We implemented CodePM on Pangolin, the state-of-the-art parity-based PTM for fault-tolerance. Evaluation results with real-world workloads on Intel Optane DCPMM show that CodePM can achieve up to 3.4× higher throughput than Pangolin.
items.abstract_zh: 新兴的持久内存（PM）可以提供大容量的持久容量，其性能可与现代内存系统中的 DRAM 相媲美。持久事务内存 (PTM) 需要确保意外断电或崩溃后数据的一致性。因此，仍然需要崩溃一致性策略，例如持久日志记录。然而，这些策略带来的额外开销（例如 PM 上的大量额外写入）可能会导致系统性能下降。在本文中，我们提出了 CodePM，这是一个容错 PM 事务库，它利用基于奇偶校验的崩溃一致性来消除日志记录开销，同时保证数据的正确状态。 CodePM 重用奇偶校验的解码能力来检测和恢复不一致的对象。为了确保更新时没有日志的一致性，CodePM 采用细粒度内存栅栏来仔细调整潜在的不一致与奇偶校验的可修复性。为了在恢复时检测没有日志的不一致，CodePM 通过重用校验和和奇偶校验来利用乐观推测扫描恢复，这支持即时恢复，但可靠性会暂时降低。此外，我们研究了内存栅栏阻塞效应，并通过流水线编码和持久写入进一步增强 CodePM，以隐藏更新延迟。我们在 Pangolin 上实现了 CodePM，这是最先进的基于奇偶校验的 PTM，用于实现容错。英特尔傲腾 DCPMM 上实际工作负载的评估结果表明，CodePM 的性能最高可达 3.4× 吞吐量高于Pangolin。
